title: Battle of Taris (disambiguation)
content:
There have been several [[List of battles/Legends|battles]] of [[Taris/Legends|Taris]]:

*The '''[[Taris Siege]]''' during the [[Mandalorian Wars]]
*The '''[[Liberation of Taris|liberation]]''' of Taris
*The '''[[Destruction of Taris|destruction]]''' of Taris in [[3956 BBY]]
*A '''[[Raid on Taris|battle]]''' in [[7 ABY/Legends|7 ABY]]
*The '''[[First battle of Taris|first battle]]''' during the [[Imperial Skirmishes]]
*The '''[[Second battle of Taris|second battle]]''' during the Imperial Skirmishes
*The [[Yuuzhan Vong]] '''[[Battle of the Taris system|conquest]]''' of the [[Taris system/Legends|Taris system]] in [[25 ABY/Legends|25 ABY]]

{{Disambig}}
